commands.purpose: Table view of invoices. Filterable by tenant, customer_id (any polymorphic type), status, date range, past-due state, series, currency. Default limit 100; --limit=0 for stream mode.

Verbose read of one invoice: base fields + billing_address snapshot + all lines with per-line tax_calculation + linked credit notes + payment history from the transactions module + audit trail. Support tool for investigating a specific customer dispute.

Scriptable invoice creation. Creates a draft invoice + freezes billing_address from customer.profile. --from-membership pre-populates lines from the membership's plan. Use invoice:describe next to review, then invoice:finalize.
Dispatch FinalizeInvoiceJob. --send-email=0 skips the SendInvoiceEmailJob dispatch (useful for staging/testing).
Initial email send. Refused when already sent (use --force to override; audit logs the force). --to overrides the customer email (typos, address changes).
Force re-send. Idempotent — sends the same email again.
Void a draft or open invoice. --reason is required and written to void_reason + audit trail. Refused when status IN ('paid', 'partially_paid') — use credit-note:create instead.
Mark a past-due invoice uncollectible. --note is required. Requires days_past_due >= config('invoice.dunning.uncollectible_after_days').

Manual reconciliation for off-platform payments (check / wire / cash). --method IN (check, wire, cash, other). --amount in cents. --reference is the check number / wire tracking / receipt. Creates a transactions row via the transaction module.

One-shot invocation of ReconcileInvoicePaymentsJob. Rolls up per-invoice payment totals from transactions. --dry-run reports drift without repairing. Findings above 0 indicate transaction module drift + a P1 signal.
Credit note ledger view. Sorted by issue_date DESC. Filterable by status, reason, date range.

Create a credit note against a paid/partially-paid invoice. --amount in cents. --reason IN (refund, adjustment, write_off, duplicate, customer_dispute_resolved, accounting_correction). --note required for adjustment / customer_dispute_resolved / accounting_correction.
Apply a credit note. --to-type IN (refund, next_invoice, customer_balance). --to is the target ULID. Transitions status issued → applied.

Unified report runner. --type=aging (0-30/31-60/61-90/91+ buckets); --type=revenue (invoiced/collected/AR balance grouped by --group-by=day|week|month|item_type); --type=tax-collected (grouped by tax_jurisdiction). --format=csv is finance-team-friendly (Excel-ready).
